textByHash.0d191ebd4881644293ae11ec0016da66fe532279: What tiny human do in troll arena? Dad challenge human to fight!
textByHash.19e6f83b05283af66386d5cdae37497d213f2b41: Troll named after first thing try to eat!
textByHash.431603361147b75db9a98d5d8488a3ff2c22655e: Coward. Dad wait for braver fighter.
textByHash.7e3b3c3cf300b6233314e2a0914b79d544bb3530: No human pass through arena without defeating Dad!
textByHash.9e47611483d34cc753e0711a139ca1387823ce18: Stop! You win. Not hurt Dad.
